version.description: The version of the automation policy schema

distribution.description: An optional name of the software distribution that this applies to

description.description: An optional description of this policy

document.description: The path of an AI_POLICY document

code_generation.description: A level of how automated systems may change the code or documentation

automated_contributions.description: A level of how non-maintainers may submit automated contributions

automated_actions.description: A level of how maintainers may use automated changes

models.description: A list of models used for automated_actions
